reviews.review_title: I don’t see why you would get this game.
reviews.review_description: Gorilla Tag is completely free on standalone quest and pretty much everyone owns it anyway, if you really want to have the locomotion just play Gorilla tag. I get that not everyone wants to be surrounded by racist 7 year olds on their brothers VR, but that’s why lobbies locked with codes exist, just play it with a close friend group.

reviews.review_title: Hello I want this old map back please
reviews.review_description: It's all my fault about the backrooms and the stuff please add the old map back please I loved your game so much I played it every single day I love your game please and I mean please give us our old map back please
The has Nelsonto do in it

reviews.review_title: I love your game it is super fun
reviews.review_description: I love your game as super fun I like how you added the bathrooms I'll give it a 10 out of 10 more stars

it is just the free locomotion for gtag no arms or anything with re-textured stuff from sketchfab. I feel it's very low effort and a small child just trying to go to school and say they have a game on applab

developer_response.body: I am sorry you feel that way, but i have never downloaded anything from sketchfab, i made EVERYTHING from scratch, except some of the textures, and yes i did use the free to use locomotion system, but so did almost every other gorilla tag like game, including bird runners, which you are a mod in i am pretty sure, and i also met you with ne time. Have a nice day!
